items.title: openhuman
items.description: Your Personal AI super intelligence. Private, Simple and extremely powerful.
items.description_zh: 您的个人人工智能超级智能。私密、简单且极其强大。

items.title: CLI-Anything
items.description: "CLI-Anything: Making ALL Software Agent-Native" -- CLI-Hub: https://clianything.cc/

items.title: cal.diy
items.description_zh: 为所有人安排基础设施。

items.title: bun
items.description: Incredibly fast JavaScript runtime, bundler, test runner, and package manager – all in one
items.description_zh: 令人难以置信的快速 JavaScript 运行时、捆绑器、测试运行器和包管理器 – 全部合而为一

items.title: Open-Generative-AI
items.description: Open-source alternative to AI video platforms — Free AI image & video generation studio with 200+ models (Flux, Midjourney, Kling, Sora, Veo). No content filters. Self-hosted, MIT licensed.
items.description_zh: AI 视频平台的开源替代方案 — 免费 AI 图像和视频生成工作室，拥有 200 多个模型（Flux、Midjourney、Kling、Sora、Veo）。没有内容过滤器。自托管，麻省理工学院许可。

items.title: Shadowbroker
items.description: Open-source intelligence for the global theater. Track everything from the corporate/private jets of the wealthy, and spy satellites, to seismic events in one unified interface. Hook an AI agent up to have it parse through data and find previously unseen correlations. The knowledge is available to all but rarely aggregated in the open, until now.
items.description_zh: 全球战区的开源情报。在一个统一的界面中跟踪从富人的公司/私人飞机、间谍卫星到地震事件的一切信息。连接人工智能代理，让它解析数据并找到以前未见过的相关性。这些知识可供所有人使用，但迄今为止很少公开汇总。

items.title: agent-skills
items.description: The secure, validated skill registry for professional AI coding agents. Extend Antigravity, Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot and more with absolute confidence.
items.description_zh: 专业人工智能编码代理的安全、经过验证的技能注册表。绝对有信心扩展反重力、克劳德密码、光标、副驾驶等。

items.title: agents-towards-production
items.description: End-to-end, code-first tutorials for building production-grade GenAI agents. From prototype to enterprise deployment.
items.description_zh: 用于构建生产级 GenAI 代理的端到端、代码优先教程。从原型到企业部署。

items.title: scientific-agent-skills
items.description: A set of ready to use Agent Skills for research, science, engineering, analysis, finance and writing.
items.description_zh: 一套用于研究、科学、工程、分析、金融和写作的现成可用的代理技能。

items.title: DreamServer
items.description: Local AI anywhere, for everyone — LLM inference, chat UI, voice, agents, workflows, RAG, and image generation. No cloud, no subscriptions.
items.description_zh: 随时随地为所有人提供本地 AI — LLM 推理、聊天 UI、语音、代理、工作流程、RAG 和图像生成。没有云，没有订阅。

items.title: shannon
items.description: Shannon Lite is an autonomous, white-box AI pentester for web applications and APIs. It analyzes your source code, identifies attack vectors, and executes real exploits to prove vulnerabilities before they reach production.
items.description_zh: Shannon Lite 是一个用于 Web 应用程序和 API 的自主白盒 AI 渗透测试程序。它会分析您的源代码，识别攻击向量，并执行真正的漏洞利用，以在漏洞到达生产环境之前证明它们。

items.title: Ghost
items.description: Independent technology for modern publishing, memberships, subscriptions and newsletters.
items.description_zh: 现代出版、会员、订阅和时事通讯的独立技术。

items.title: medusa
items.description: The world's most flexible commerce platform.
items.description_zh: 全球最灵活的商务平台。

items.title: listmonk
items.description: High performance, self-hosted, newsletter and mailing list manager with a modern dashboard. Single binary app.
items.description_zh: 具有现代化仪表板的高性能、自托管新闻通讯和邮件列表管理器。单个二进制应用程序。
